allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\HTML\\MerchantHub\\wireframe.html' -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $emojis = [regex]::Matches\($content, '[\\p{So}\\p{Cs}]'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; $emojis | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 80 | Format-Table Count, Name -AutoSize)

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\HTML\\MerchantHub\\wireframe.html' -Encoding UTF8; $start = 13145; $end = 14769; $section = $lines[$start..$end] -join "`n"; $emojis = [regex]::Matches\($section, '[\\p{So}\\p{Cs}\\p{Sk}]'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; $emojis | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table Count, Name -AutoSize)

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content -Path 'C:\\Users\\ADMIN\\Desktop\\HTML\\MerchantHub\\wireframe.html' -Encoding UTF8; $start = 13145; $end = 14770; for \($i = $start; $i -le $end -and $i -lt $lines.Length; $i++\) { $line = $lines[$i]; if \([regex]::IsMatch\($line, '[\\p{So}\\p{Sk}]'\) -or [regex]::IsMatch\($line, '[\\uD800-\\uDBFF][\\uDC00-\\uDFFF]'\)\) { $emojiOnly = [regex]::Replace\($line, '[\\x00-\\x7F]', ''\); if \($emojiOnly.Trim\(\).Length -gt 0\) { Write-Output \("{0}: {1}" -f \($i+1\), $line.Trim\(\)\) } } })
